title: viola calcarata subsp. cavillieri
intro: Viola calcarata subsp. cavillieri, also known as the alpine pansy, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the violet family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health. The herbal preparations of Viola calcarata subsp. cavillieri include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
